title: Classic Handhelds
description: Brings back the classic item models from before 1.8
body:
#### **Classic Handhelds**

A little personal project of mine that brings back the old 3rd person item models. It's compatible with most mods and resourcepacks so you shouldn't have to worry about anything looking out of place. If you encounter any issues please file a report on this pack's GitHub page. Updates will be released whenever I feel like it, but this should work with any version of Minecraft despite the in-game warnings
